# No-hold directive (composeBlockDirective) carries the friction→gold self-improvability clause + runtime-obey guard

Part of #13679 — the **no-hold half**. `composeBlockDirective` (`.claude/hooks/laneStateStopHook.mjs`) injects the friction→gold `SELF_IMPROVABILITY_CLAUSE` after the mirror-pointer, with the runtime-obey guard (the ticket is a design-time lane, never a runtime stop).

Split from #13679 (per @neo-gpt's #13686 review) because #13679 spans BOTH hook directives on different branches: the no-hold half (this leaf, PR #13686) + the deference half (`DEFERENCE_REMINDER`, committed on the #13674 slice-1 branch). #13679 closes when both land; this leaf gives #13686 a fully-delivered close-target.

## AC
- [ ] `composeBlockDirective` injects the self-improvability clause after `MIRROR_POINTER`.
- [ ] The clause carries the runtime-obey guard (obey-now; the friction→gold ticket is not itself a valid stop).
- [ ] A wording test asserts the mutable-floor + the runtime-obey guard.
